scripts.test:allure: npx playwright test && npm run allure:generate && npm run allure:open
scripts.allure:history: if exist allure-report\history (if not exist allure-results\history mkdir allure-results\history && xcopy /s /e /y allure-report\history allure-results\history)
scripts.allure:generate: npm run allure:history && npx allure generate allure-results -o allure-report
